name: Three-Peas-in-a-Pasta (Lowfat)
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces snow peas, cut into slivers
16 ounces cooked garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained
1 cup skim milk, or lowfat milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat olive or vegetable oil over medium heat.
- Saute garlic and snow peas for 2 minutes; remove with slotted spoon.
3. Add petite peas to the skillet; lower heat, cover and simmer for 3 minutes.
4. Reserve 1 cup of petite peas; add remainder to blender along with broth,
herbs, pepper, salt, milk and feta. Blend until smooth.
5. Return sauce to pan with remaining peas, sauteed snow peas, garlic and chickpeas.
Heat through over low heat, stirring without scalding.
6. Combine pasta with sauce; if needed, add more warm broth or milk for desired consistency.
Serve immediately with additional feta cheese and/or red pepper, if desired.
Note: 1 teaspoon dried basil may be substituted for fresh basil. (527 calories, 9g fat)
